{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Pawns of the Iron Legion
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Pawns of the Iron Legion]] are enemies approaching [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Pawns of the Iron Legion]] are creatures made of flesh and metal.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c20">''The Captain'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
